cases.prompt: 신흥시장 저대역폭 2G/3G 사용자를 위해 오프라인 우선 아키텍처 짜줘

assertions.text: Runs a precheck to measure current bundle/image weight rather than guessing
Fixes a network-class payload budget table (initial JS/image/route caps per Slow-2G/3G/4G)
Picks per-resource cache strategies (Workbox precache/StaleWhileRevalidate/BackgroundSync) or Expo SQLite + TanStack Query persist

cases.prompt: make my web app save data on metered connections with offline support

assertions.text: Adds Save-Data / NetworkInformation handling with feature-detection and a conservative fallback for non-Chromium browsers
Implements optimistic UI plus background sync so offline writes are queued and flushed on reconnect

cases.prompt: 내 앱이 저사양 안드로이드에서 너무 느려, 데이터 절약하고 graceful degradation 적용해줘

assertions.text: Adds explicit online / sync-pending / offline state banners instead of failing silently
Provides a low-end device test matrix (CPU throttle, Slow 3G, 2GB RAM) and a responsive AVIF/WebP lazy image strategy
